channel.title: D&D With Brian and Friends – Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Guide on D&D With Brian and Friends

item.title: D&D With Brian and Friends!
item.description: This is where I’m keeping all of the game info. It’s like a wiki. It helps me keep my thoughts and notes organized and plan future games and story beats, but also to keep certain story elements straight. I thought you guys might like to have the reference handy, as well.
